characters.name: Anne McCormick
characters.description: Anneis the part of the newly-married, elderly couple that moved intoGrayson's former home onFreeling Drive. Before moving toFreeling Drive, Norman and Anne briefly lived together in a retirement community after their marriage. However, the pair found the attitude and atmosphere of the retirement community to be depressing, and decided to move to an area full of younger couples to keep them feeling young.[1]

characters.name: Barb Coman
characters.description: Barb is a real estate agent and business colleague ofJules. She is also very liberal with sexual advice she offers to Jules. Barbara "Barb" Coman is a real estate agent inGulfhavenand business associate ofJules. She is friendly with Jules and often gives her unsolicited advice about dating and life. She is notorious for her double-entendres and innuendo. Barb eventually settled down with and married former mayorRoger Frank. The pair was wed on the beach ofGulfhaven.

characters.name: Bobby Cobb
characters.description: Bobby Cobb(portrayed by Brian Van Holt) isJules Cobbsamiable ex-husband. Bobby CobbmarriedJulesafter she became pregnant at age 19. Bobby was unfaithful for years eventually leading to their divorce.[1]Bobby is a classic under-achiever who’ll test Jules' patience as they attempt to raise their teenage son,Travis. Bobby has worked a number of jobs including cutting the grass at North Gulfhaven High School and offering private golf lessons. Recently Bobby returned to semi-professional golfing.[2]He has also come into a large sum of money by selling the rights toPenny Can.[3]

characters.name: Chalk Children
characters.description: The Chalk Children are three creepy homeschooled children living on/nearFreeling Drive. The "Chalk Children" are a group of three young, creepy, emotionless, dark homeschooled children living on/nearFreeling DriveinGulfhaven. They often use chalk to draw eerie/disburbing drawings neighborhood sidewalks and driveways. Its reported that they draw what they dream.[1] Royce looking throughGrayson's window

characters.name: Chick
characters.description: Jules(Daughter)Travis Cobb(Grandson)Bobby Cobb(Ex-Son-in-Law)Grayson Ellis(Son-in-Law)Bobby Cobb (baby)(Great-Grandson) ChickisJules Cobb's father. A ranch owner from Alabama, he had Jules, his only child, with his wife Bea (deceased). Chick is in his early 70s, and lives on his ranch in Alabama, where he lived with his wife and raised their daughter.

characters.name: Dog Travis
characters.description: Dog Travis the pet ofBobby Cobb. Dog Travis primarily lives withBobby CobbonJealous Much?though he occasionally roams theGulfhavenbeach or staying atTravis Cobb's shared home.

characters.name: Ellie Torres
characters.description: "Sure, sure."— Ellie Torres Ellie Torres(portrayed by Christa Miller) is the wife ofAndy Torres, mother ofStan Torresand best friend ofJules Cobb. Elisabeth "Ellie" TorresisJules' next door neighbor and best friend. Ellie is married toAndy Torres, and the two have a son Stan. She is the sarcastic, unapologetic confidante content who is often jealous of Jules' young assistant and friend,Laurie. She first met Jules when she and Bobby bought their house, at first she didn't like Jules because they were rednecks but eventually warmed to her after a conversation about her and Andy's relationship. Since then they've been inseparable. Ellie thinks Laurie is trying to steal Jules from her, and doesn't get along with Laurie. She also loves to gossip but feels that Jules' new lifestyle is coming between their friendship. She used to be a lawyer, it is unknown when she quit but she was still a lawyer when Jules and Bobby moved into Freeling Drive. She told Jules that "Once I found out me and Andy were sharing money, I quit my job bought myself a new T.V. and 10 pairs of sweatpants; never looked back".

characters.name: Grayson Ellis
characters.description: Grayson EllisisJules Cobb's neighbor and husband. He is portrayed byJosh Hopkins. Grayson Elliswas born in 1970 (his age is given as 40 in season 2) toMr and Mrs Ellis. During his childhood he was very close to his father, and one of his best childhood memories was that of his father and him building a model rocket ship. Both of his parents died in 2009, just before the series began. During his childhood, Grayson participated in pageants, to Ellie's great amusement when she discovered this many years later. In his adulthood he also worked as an underwear model and as an exotic bartender in Florida, appearing in bartender calendars. At some point he relocated to Gulfhaven where he opened up his own bar,Gray's Pub,  where he is constantly bothered by his friends stealing beer and wine.

characters.name: Holly
characters.description: Hollyis the mother ofTampawith one time lover,Grayson Ellis. During his sexually promiscuous phase,Graysonhooked up with Holly for a one night stand. That night, Holly conceivedTampa.[1] Because Holly andLauriewere old friends, Laurie was named Tampa's godmother. Since discovering her existence, Grayson  visits Tampa.[2]

characters.name: Jules Cobb
characters.description: "I don't wanna be the insane mom whose son refuses to come visit with his girlfriend"— Jules Cobb Jules Cobb(portrayed byCourteney Cox) is a newly divorced woman in her forties, and head ofThe Cul-de-Sac Crew. Jules Cobbwas born in 1968 (her age is given as 41 in season 1) to Chick and Bea. After her mother died, she and her father grew apart as she reminded him too much of her mother. They later rekindle their relationship and soon become very close again.

characters.description: Bobby Cobb (baby)(Son)Travis Cobb(Boyfriend/Future Husband)Jules Cobb(Best Friend/Future Mother-in-Law)Bobby Cobb(Friend/Future Father-in-Law)Grayson Ellis(Friend/Future Step-Father-in-Law) "What, what!"— Laurie Keller Laurie Keller(portrayed byBusy Philipps) is one ofJules Cobb's best-friends. characters.name: Stan Torres
characters.description: Stan Torresis the only child ofEllie TorresandAndy Torres. In the new season on TBS, he was portrayed by Sawyer Ever, Christopher and Zachary Randazzo and Griffin Kunitz. Stanley Torres was born in 2009. He was named after his paternal grandfather who passed away shortly before his birth.[1]While Ellie is a stay-at-home mother, Stan also has a nanny. Recently Stan has begun acting out, terrorizing his parents, and becoming very similar toLaurie.[2]

characters.name: Tampa
characters.description: Grayson Ellis(Father)Jules Cobb(Step-Mother)Laurie Keller(Godmother) TampaisGrayson's illegitimate daughter he fathered withHolly. Tampa is the one-year-old daughter ofGraysonandHolly, and the result of a one night stand during his sexually promiscuous phase.[1]

characters.name: Ted Buckland
characters.description: Ted is a depressing former lawyer and current beach bumTravisandthe groupmet in Hawaii. Theodore "Ted" Buckland, Esq.was the lawyer of New Sacred Heart Hospital until he left to spend time travelling and with his now ex girlfriend, Stephanie Gooch. He now spends his time in Hawaii playing guitar and has the ability to turn any song into sounding sad.[1]

characters.name: Tom Gazelian
characters.description: Tom (portrayed by Robert "Bob" Clendenin) isJules' recently widowed neighbor, who desperately wants to be a member ofThe Cul-de-Sac Crewand date Jules. Dr. Thomas Gazelian, MD, commonly known merely asTomis one ofJules' neighbors living onFreeling DriveinGulfhaven. Tom works as the head neurosurgeon atGulfhaven Memorial Hospital.[1] Tom is an Armenian, thus having the suffix-ianin his family name. Tom was married for several years, but recently his wife, Joanne, passed away. The couple has two children: Bryce, who's currently serving in the U.S. Marines, and Hayley, who's currently attending law school.[2]

characters.name: Travis Cobb
characters.description: Travis Cobb(portrayed byDan Byrd) is the sharp-tongued teenage son ofJulesandBobby Cobb. Travis Cobbis confident, quick witted and keeps Jules on her toes when he's at home, however, when it comes to being social, Travis can get pretty awkward. He loves both of his parents very much, despite Jules saying whatever is on her mind without thinking and his always embarrassing dad. His pet peeves include any male that finds Jules attractive. <references/>
